summary: Tested Optional Rejection Reason Feature - Backend APIs (8 passed, 6 skipped due to no pending data) and Frontend RejectModal component verified. All admin rejection APIs (/api/admin/sellers/{id}/reject, /api/admin/delivery/{id}/reject, /api/admin/food/stores/{id}/reject, /api/admin/food-offers/{id}/reject) accept requests without the 'reason' field.
critical_code_review_comments: RejectModal.js correctly shows '(اختياري)' label next to the reason field
All rejection APIs properly handle null/empty reason parameter
RejectModal is properly integrated in all 5 required components: PendingSellersTab.js, DeliveryTab.js, FoodStoresTab.js, PendingProductsTab.js, WithdrawalsTab.js
Note: FoodOffersTab.js has its own inline RejectModal for flash sale requests (different use case)

success_rate.backend: 100% (8 passed, 6 skipped - no pending data to test actual rejection)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Optional rejection reason feature fully tested. Backend APIs verified: POST /api/admin/sellers/{id}/reject, POST /api/admin/delivery/{id}/reject, POST /api/admin/food/stores/{id}/reject, PUT /api/admin/food-offers/{id}/reject - all accept empty JSON body {}. Frontend RejectModal component (/app/frontend/src/components/admin/RejectModal.js) has data-testid attributes: reject-modal, reject-reason-input, reject-modal-close, reject-modal-cancel, reject-modal-confirm. The modal shows optional label '(اختياري)' next to the reason field.

reject_seller_api_without_reason.details: Accepts empty JSON body, returns success message

reject_seller_api_with_reason.details: No pending sellers available to test with reason

reject_food_offer_api_without_reason.details: Successfully rejected food offer without providing reason

auth_required_for_rejection_apis.details: All 4 rejection APIs return 401 without authentication

admin_role_required.details: Seller and delivery reject APIs return 403 for non-admin users

reject_modal_ui_component.details: RejectModal.js has optional label, text input for reason, data-testid attributes for testing

reject_modal_integration.details: RejectModal is properly imported in PendingSellersTab, DeliveryTab, FoodStoresTab, PendingProductsTab, WithdrawalsTab
